episodes.title: Melania Trump talks about her connection to Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description:
An expected First Lady statement with very unexpected contents. The world is blindsided as Melania Trump talks all things her relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. 

The big question is - why has she come out and said all this now?

We speak on the phone to the man who says it was him, not Jeffrey Epstein, who introduced Melania and Donald.

Plus - Donald Trump publishes a video of a woman being murdered - without blurring the footage. It comes as calls increase in some quarters to challenge the president with the 25th Amendment. 

We explain what that is - and whether it could work in practice. 

And, the ceasefire in Iran. Is it holding? Is Israel listening to the US or ignoring it? NATO’s Secretary General is in town to try keep the FIFA Peace Prize winner… peaceful.

episodes.title: QUICK REACTION: PAM BONDI SACKED. Was it over the Epstein Files?
episodes.description:
Donald Trump fires another cabinet member - this time it’s Pam Bondi, the Attorney General. 

She’s to leave for an “important job in the private sector… to be announced at a date in the near future”, so says the president. Helpful wording when you get your P45.  

Why has she been sacked? Who’s replacing her? And how does this play into another topsy turvy 24 hours in Trump world?

We have the latest.

episodes.title: Hillary Clinton testifies on Epstein
episodes.description: Hillary Clinton has testified under oath in a closed-door deposition before the House Oversight Committee, questioned about Jeffrey Epstein and the powerful network around him. She has denied that she had any knowledge of Epstein's crimes and didn't recall ever meeting him, flying on his plane, or visiting any of his properties. At the same time, US and Iranian officials meet in Geneva for delicate nuclear talks, negotiations unfolding as Trump beefs up America’s military presence in the Middle East. Plus, a stunning development in the global media industry as Netflix bows out of a bid to buy Warner Brothers which will instead be swallowed instead by a pal of the president. Mark and James explain. Remember, you can watch Trump100 on our YouTube channel . Email us at trump100@sky.uk with your comments and questions.

episodes.title: Why are we not talking about Donald Trump in the Epstein Files?
episodes.description: The fallout from the release of more than three million documents on Friday by the Department of Justice. The Epstein files… with fresh questions aimed at Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor and Lord Peter Mandelson. Plus - what’s Trump’s involvement in the files? Plus - the Trump Kennedy Center? "Closed for refurbishment," so says the president. Why? And the Grammys get political. You can watch all episodes on our YouTube channel . Email us on trump100@sky.uk with your comments and questions.
